case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ARNOLD K WONG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEYS FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, ARNOLD K AN INDIVIDUAL $17,284.05 PRINCIPAL, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,714.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ARNOLD K AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-12-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED JUN-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ARNOLD K AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF PETER HUBER IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PRUSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
